creator: Cy.Schubert@komquats.com
text:
Please copy ports/security/tripwire/files/patch-contrib::install.cfg,v to
ports/security/tripwire/files/patch-install::install.cfg,v

The file being patched in the port's extracted distfile has been moved.

Fix: 

Repocopy request.
How-To-Repeat: Repocopy request.
